 NationalitiesTechno Brain’s vision is to be recognized as a respected, global IT firm, highly valued by its customers, employees and partners.VISIONTechno Brain is a CMMI Level 5 company established in 1997. With operations spread across Africa, Asia, USA, UK and UAE. Techno Brain Provides ICT Solutions, IT Education & Training and Outsourcing Services to Government, NGOs and Private sector organizations worldwide.
Our Competencies and experience spans the entire spectrum of ICT Solutions, Education and 
Training and Outsourcing services.
• Business & Technology Consulting
• Implementation Services• Custom Software Development• Business Process Outsourcing• IT Enabled Services• Product Development• System Integration• IT Training & Education
• IT Infrastructure Services
• Managed IT Services
Our Proven ability to deliver innovative solutions that help 
businesses across various verticals to achieve their goals has earned us reputation as the preferred technology partner in Africa and globally.
1


IT SOLUTIONS
OUTSOURCING IT TRAINING & CONSUL TINGWe provide IT Solutions that help clients accelerate innovation, optimize business processes and maximize value from their IT investments. Our 
service span across the range of ICT with specialized solutions such as Secure Credentials and IFMS that can build, manage and support IT systems for our customers, across the entire value chain
We provide Integrated Customer Experience Lifecycle Management Services which include Call Centre Support, Back- Office Management, 
Data Collection, Market Assistance, IT Enabled Services, Research and Analysis Services to local and international companies in a wide range of industries. These include telecom and internet service providers, banking and  financial services, retail, healthcare, technology, travel, hospitality and public sectorWe provide end-to-end training solutions including training needs analysis, content development, trainer certifications, training delivery & post-
training support.70+
